name: Companhia Melhoramentos de Sao Paulo
summary: Companhia Melhoramentos de S√É¬£o Paulo primarily engages in publishing business in Brazil. It offers children's literature, such as youth and school books; and customized books for companies. The company also engages in developing and managing forests; and conducting reforestation activities of pines and eucalyptus. In addition, it is involved in the production of thermo ground wood, bleached thermo ground wood, and neolux fibers used in the production of paperboard, tissue and special papers. The company is also involved in real estate development business. The company was formerly known as Companhia Melhoramentos de S√É¬£o Paulo Ind. de Papel and changed its name to Companhia Melhoramentos de S√É¬£o Paulo in August 1994. Companhia Melhoramentos de S√É¬£o Paulo was founded in 1890 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
